# Support

Fgentic is maintained as an open-source project. Community support is best effort: the project does not promise a response time, production support, or a service-level agreement.

Choose the route that matches your request:

| Request                                                                | Where to go                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Usage, configuration, evaluation, or an early idea                     | Search the [documentation](../docs/) and existing [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/fmind-ai/fgentic/discussions), then start a discussion if the answer is not already there.                                           |
| Reproducible defect in Fgentic-owned code, manifests, or documentation | Open the [bug report form](https://github.com/fmind-ai/fgentic/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) with minimal reproduction steps and redacted evidence.                                                                      |
| Concrete, scoped enhancement proposal                                  | Open the [feature request form](https://github.com/fmind-ai/fgentic/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml). Use Discussions first when the scope or design is still exploratory.                                             |
| Security vulnerability                                                 | Follow the [security policy](../SECURITY.md) and report privately through a [GitHub security advisory](https://github.com/fmind-ai/fgentic/security/advisories/new). Never disclose vulnerability details in a public channel. |
| Help preparing a contribution                                          | Read the [contribution guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md), then ask in Discussions if the workflow remains unclear.                                                                                                                    |
| Behavior or vulnerability in an upstream component                     | Use that upstream project's support or security channel. The [licensing and component map](../docs/licensing.md) identifies the composed projects; Fgentic cannot provide support for their internals.                         |

Before sharing logs or configuration, remove credentials, tokens, personal data, private room content, and internal hostnames. Public support channels are not appropriate for confidential material.
